title: User friendly link urls for card links.
excerpt:
The link urls need to be waaay more user friendly. 
We post them in lots of places: from Slack, to message bodies talking about project updates to private dms. 
It really needs to be simpler. 
fancypantsTeam.monday.dev/i…

posts.author: PureKrome (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
The link urls need to be waaay more user friendly.
We post them in lots of places: from Slack, to message bodies talking about project updates to private dms.

It really needs to be simpler.

fancypantsTeam.monday.dev/issue/10/update-card

anything a bit better than the status quo.

please don’t insult us by saying things like “its too hard” “legacy software prevents blah blah de blah”, etc. Its all possible and doable.

This make this happen!
